zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Legh III於1361年3月2日出生在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓時，他的父親Robert de Legh II37歲，母親Matilda d'Arderne15歲。他於1384年之前與Isabel De Belgrave結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1408年8月9日在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Legh III于1361年3月2日出生在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓时，他的父亲Robert de Legh II37岁，母亲Matilda d'Arderne15岁。他于1384年之前与Isabel De Belgrave结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1408年8月9日在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Legh III was born on 2 March 1361, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Legh II, was 37 and his mother, Matilda d'Arderne, was 15. He married Isabel De Belgrave before 1384. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 August 1408, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Legh III est né le 2 mars 1361, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Legh II, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Matilda d'Arderne, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Isabel De Belgrave avant 1384. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 août 1408, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Legh III am 2. März 1361 in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Legh II 37 und seine Mutter Matilda d'Arderne 15. Er hat vor 1384 Isabel De Belgrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. August 1408 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England und wurde in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Legh III è nato il il 2 marzo 1361 nel Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Legh II, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Matilda d'Arderne, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Isabel De Belgrave prima del 1384. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 agosto 1408, nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Legh IIIが1361年3月2日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh IIは37歳，母Matilda d'Arderneは15歳であった。1384年以前にIsabel De Belgraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年8月9日にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Legh III(이)가 1361년 3월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Legh II(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda d'Arderne(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1384년 이전 Isabel De Belgrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년 8월 9일 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.1392: de 9 de janeiro de 1392 a 8 de janeiro de 1393
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Legh III nasceu em 2 de março de 1361, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Legh II, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Matilda d'Arderne, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel De Belgrave antes 1384. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1408, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Legh III родился 2 марта 1361 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Legh II было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda d'Arderne, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel De Belgrave перед 1384 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 августа 1408 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
